lines: India versus Pakistan. Military only. Who wins?
Active personnel gives India the first edge. About 1 point 43 million versus 660 thousand.
Defense budget is where the gap explodes. India spends about 109 billion dollars. Pakistan is near 9 billion.
Total aircraft also favor India. About 2,183 versus 1,397.
Fighter aircraft are closer, but India still leads. 476 versus 331.
Tank strength goes to India too. 3,913 tanks versus 2,677.
At sea, India has overwhelming depth. 343 naval assets versus 120.
But nuclear warheads are far closer. India is estimated around 190. Pakistan around 170.
So in conventional military depth, India wins clearly. But the nuclear balance keeps the rivalry dangerous.

seo.title: India vs Pakistan — Who Wins Militarily? 🇮🇳🇵🇰
seo.description:
India vs Pakistan military comparison: active troops, defense budget, aircraft, fighters, tanks, naval assets, and nuclear warheads.
